inputs.label: Initial Pressure (P1)
inputs.businessContext: Starting pressure of the gas in the system

inputs.label: Final Pressure (P2)
inputs.businessContext: Pressure after change (leave blank to calculate)

inputs.label: Final Volume (V2)
inputs.businessContext: Volume after change (leave blank to calculate)

formulas.calculateFinalPressure: if (initialPressure && initialVolume && finalVolume && finalVolume !== 0) { return (initialPressure * initialVolume) / finalVolume; } else { return null; }
formulas.calculateFinalVolume: if (initialPressure && initialVolume && finalPressure && finalPressure !== 0) { return (initialPressure * initialVolume) / finalPressure; } else { return null; }
formulas.calculateInitialPressure: if (finalPressure && finalVolume && initialVolume && initialVolume !== 0) { return (finalPressure * finalVolume) / initialVolume; } else { return null; }
formulas.calculateInitialVolume: if (finalPressure && finalVolume && initialPressure && initialPressure !== 0) { return (finalPressure * finalVolume) / initialPressure; } else { return null; }
formulas.result: Calculated unknown variable (P2 or V2 or P1 or V1)

breakdown: Product of initial pressure and volume: {initialPressure} * {initialVolume} = {product}
Product of final pressure and volume: {finalPressure} * {finalVolume} = {product2}
